title: What it actually looks like to put the phone down
caption:
You keep calling it a habit. That's why you keep losing.

It's not a habit. It's a stronghold — the thing that redirects every spare moment of your life toward a screen, where lust lives, where envy lives, where your time goes to die.

You don't fix a stronghold with a detox or a screen time limit. You wage a war.

Set the hard border. Put it in another room. Delete the app. Replace the gap with something that actually feeds you. And win the first ten minutes of the morning cold — because the man who picks up the phone before prayer has already surrendered the day.

This is your generation's battle. Your grandfather never fought it. You either fight it, or it runs you.

—

Save this for the man who keeps saying he'll work on it.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #phonefasting #scripture #selfcontrol #manofgod
